title: Maytenus diversifolia
taxonomy: Maytenus diversifolia is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Celastraceae. It is a part of the genus Maytenus, which comprises around 60 species of evergreen or deciduous shrubs and small trees. The Celastraceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the bittersweet family, which consists of around 1,300 species. Maytenus diversifolia is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is often found in humid and shaded areas, and is known for its medicinal properties.
